item.title: Tesollo and Techman Robot unveil robot for high-mix, low-volume production
item.description: Tesollo demonstrated its DG-3F-M articulated gripper with Techman's TM5S cobot arm for tasks such as bin picking and assembly. The post Tesollo and Te...

item.title: Dexterity unveils Foresight world model for truck loading
item.description: Foresight is Dexterity's physics-consistent world model, a real-time, transactable representation of the physical environment. The post Dexterity unve...

item.title: MassRobotics resident startups surpass $2B in funding
item.description: MassRobotics' mission is to help create and scale the next generation of successful robotics and physical AI companies. The post MassRobotics resident...

item.title: AW 2026 features Korea humanoid debuts as industry seeks digital transformation
item.description: In addition to humanoid robots from Agibot, Boston Dynamics, Leju, and Unitree, AW 2026 showed opportunities for physical AI in South Korea. The post ...

item.title: Noble Machines exits stealth with Moby humanoid
item.description: Noble Machines said it already shipped AI-driven humanoids robots to a Fortune Global 500 customer within 18 months of launch. The post Noble Machines...
